query: SELECT p.id, p.name FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 150004 AND (p.name LIKE '%sorvete%' OR p.name LIKE '%Sorvete%' OR p.name LIKE '%pote%' OR p.name LIKE '%Pote%');
